meaning: n.[生]超个体(指群居昆虫等的群体)
examples: For Clements, the climax was a "superorganism", an organic entity.
Wheeler said the superorganism of the hive "emerges" from the mass of ordinary insect organisms.
Even some authors who accepted the climax concept rejected Clements' characterization of it as a superorganism, and it is indeed a misleading metaphor.
All living things, he theorized, have a regulatory effect on the Earth's environment, working together as one complete "superorganism" to sustain life.
For the latest research shows their physiologies are linked in ways which make the idea of a human superorganism more than just a rhetorical flourish.
